name: AnonAddy
tagline: Privacy-focused email aliasing and forwarding service
subtitle: Protect your real inbox with unlimited email aliases
description: AnonAddy is an open-source, privacy-focused email aliasing and forwarding platform. It allows users to create unlimited email aliases, forward messages to real inboxes, and disable aliases at any time. AnonAddy supports encrypted forwarding, custom domains, subdomains, and can be fully self-hosted as a privacy-preserving alternative to commercial email aliasing services.

features.title: Email Alias Management
features.description: Create, enable, disable, and organize email aliases

features.title: Email Forwarding
features.description: Forward alias emails to one or more real inboxes

features.title: Encrypted Forwarding
features.description: Encrypt forwarded emails using PGP for added privacy

features.title: Custom Domains & Subdomains
features.description: Use your own domains or subdomains for aliases

features.title: Web Dashboard
features.description: Manage aliases and settings through a web interface

features.title: Self-Hosted Deployment
features.description: Run AnonAddy on your own infrastructure for full data control

notes: Requires a properly configured mail server for self-hosting
Supports PGP encryption for forwarded emails
Official hosted service available at addy.io
